steps.title: Identify the attraction signal
steps.content: The key signal is the phrase “Drawn by its silent call.” The preposition “by” indicates causation—the speaker is being pulled toward the woods because of nature's call.

steps.title: Match the signal to the meaning
steps.content: The target meaning is attraction or being tempted into something. Enticed perfectly expresses this—the silent call of nature is enticing the speaker into the woods. The other choices describe unrelated actions or contradict the context. That matches choice C — C is correct.
